_description: Sort a dimension by a measure using a view-level sort node. This is the ONLY reliable sort method — CDP tabdoc:sort is unreliable and datasource-level sorts get stripped.

sort_node._placement: Direct child of worksheet > table > view (sibling to datasources, filter, slices)

notes.using: The measure column-instance to sort by
WRONG_placements: Inside column node in datasource-dependencies — stripped by loadMetadataFromXml
shelf-sort-deltas at table level — stripped by loadMetadataFromXml
notes.CDP_sort_command: tabdoc:sort is unreliable — use workbook JSON view-level sort instead
